entity.label: Achzib
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A town in the Shephelah, or plain country of Judah (Josh. 15:44); probably the same as Chezib of Gen. 38:5 = Ain Kezbeh.

nodes.label: Achzib
nodes.description: A town in the Shephelah, or plain country of Judah (Josh. 15:44); probably the same as Chezib of Gen. 38:5 = Ain Kezbeh.

verses.text: And Keilah, and Achzib, and Mareshah; nine cities with their villages:
Therefore shalt thou give presents to Moreshethgath: the houses of Achzib shall be a lie to the kings of Israel.
